REPLY BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100010260) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, SCOTT

SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF DON A. LESSER SUPPORTING PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100010260) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, SCOTT

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SCOTT SMITH'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS - PLAINTIFF SMITH'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO HIS FIRST SET OF REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS BROWN, DEROUSSE, AND DEMETER ENERGY CORPORATION SHALL PRODUCE ALL NON-PRIVILEGED DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 31, 2015. DEFENDANTS' OBJECTION TO ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS A CONTENTION ABOUT THE SHAREHOLDER STATUS OF PLAINTIFF, WHICH IS AN ISSUE IN DISPUTE IN THIS LITIGATION. IT IS NOT, HOWEVER, A VALID BASIS TO DENY PLAINTIFF THE RIGHT TO DISCOVERY ABOUT THE MERITS OF HIS CLAIMS. DEFENDANTS' POSITION IS ONE THAT IS BEST SUITED TO A DEMURRER OR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, BUT IS NOT APPLICABLE TO DISCOVERY MOTIONS. DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL ARE SANCTIONED FOR MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS BECAUSE THEY OBJECTED TO DISCOVERY AND OPPOSING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION WITHOUT SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY SANCTIONED IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,340, PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF NO LATER THAN JANUARY 18, 2016. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: CONOR MOORE; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points &Amp; Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF SCOTT SMITH's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs First Set Of Requests For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions - Plaintiff Smith's motion to compel further responses to his first set of Requests for Production of Documents is granted. Defendants Brown, Derousse, and Demeter Energy Corporation shall produce all non-privileged documents responsive to Plaintiff's Requests for Production no later than December 31, 2015. Defendants' objection to all of Plaintiff's discovery requests is a contention about the shareholder status of Plaintiff, which is an issue in dispute in this litigation. It is not, however, a valid basis to deny Plaintiff the right to discovery about the merits of his claims. Defendants' position is one that is best suited to a demurrer or motion for summary judgment, but is not applicable to discovery motions. Defendants and their counsel are sanctioned for misuse of the discovery process because they objected to discovery and opposing Plaintiff's motion without substantial justification. Defendants and their counsel are jointly and severally sanctioned in the amount of $4,340, payable to Plaintiff no later than January 18, 2016. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Pro tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt
